text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During summer camp, Yaeno Muteki trains
rigorously in preparation for the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff...
choice_data_list: Target time achieved! Let's take a break.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Osu! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oh, you taking a break too, Yaeno?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I bet she's keeping you busy, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is Bamboo Memory. She's energetic, polite,
and a member of the disciplinary committee to
boot.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Hi there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And this is Gold City. Known for her work as a
fashion model, it's no wonder she attracts a lot of
attention at the beach.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While Yaeno Muteki and Bamboo Memory are
peers competing in the Twinkle Series, Gold City
is in the year above them.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: City was just telling me how amazing Tamamo is!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That's right. Tamamo has had an astonishing
amount of press lately.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross—also known as White
Lightning—is a runner who suddenly made a name
for herself last year, around the end of her classic
year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having grown up without much money, Tamamo
Cross's resilience in overcoming adversity to
pursue her dreams has captured people's hearts
and driven her rise in popularity.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I competed in all three Classic Triple Crown races,
so I never thought I'd lose to Tamamo.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But she was just so... overwhelming in the spring
Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's why this year you're all in on summer camp,
right?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Well, you know. It's the only way I can catch up to
Tamamo and keep up with my modeling as well.
I'll win next time, for sure.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of which, everyone in your year is
getting all excited about Oguri, aren't they?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hers is a real success story—she's a country girl
who made it to the nationals.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
If she keeps on winning, her popularity's bound to
skyrocket, right?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Oguri...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of, Yaeno, didn't you compete against
Oguri in the Mainichi Hai? How was that?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Indeed. When I think back to her...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(It didn't feel like she had a distinctly intimidating
aura.)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(She was as serene as still water and ran naturally,
calm and composed.)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(She was like a mountain reflecting radiant
sunshine.)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: (Or pure flowing water.)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(Driven by the overpowering instinct to simply
run, she raced ahead as if it was only natural to
do so.)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: (She was in a state of absolute zen...)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(Her state of mind was the sort a warrior aspires
to achieve before battle. I see now... That's the
aura that enveloped her.)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(Is that why I felt our confrontation to be
inevitable? Was it her spirit washing over me? )

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Um, Yaeno?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Huh? ...Oh, excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Oguri and I run in entirely different ways. You
might say that her running style is the exact
opposite of mine.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Really? So how strong is she?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I perceive her abilities as being sage-like in
nature.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Sage-like?! So Oguri must be insanely strong,
huh?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: You'd never guess, just looking at her now...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I glance over to where Gold City is indicating...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Well, she's on a winning streak, and there's no
doubt she's got talent.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hey, how about we do some group training? We
can come up with a strategy to beat Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hm... Very well.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Count me in. I'm sure I'll be up against Oguri
sooner or later, so I may as well.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Nice! It's decided!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Trainer. What kind of training would you
recommend?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing as we're at the beach, we should do some
training that takes advantage of the sandy
environment, so...
choice_data_list:
How about we put our socks on and play beach
flags?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
How exactly does watermelon splitting constitute
training?
choice_data_list:
It'll improve your concentration and sense of
balance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Being blindfolded makes even walking in a
straight line tough. You need both a high level of
concentration and impeccable balance.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
True, some martial arts training involves standing
on one leg with your eyes closed to improve
balance. Training without the benefits of sight
could yield good results.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's get ready!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo! You're turning further and further to the
left!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Raise your right shoulder and straighten your
body. ...Ah, now it's too high!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Waaah! I can't stand still!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huh. How did you two walk so straight like that?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Well, I am a model. I'm used to walking straight ahead.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You must learn to perceive with your other
senses, not just your eyes. That's a fundamental
aspect of martial arts.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Nghhh! I refuse to lose! I'm gonna nail this
training!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After their productive training session, everyone
enjoys the sweet and refreshing watermelon
together.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'm okay with beach flags, but why is it necessary
to wear socks?
choice_data_list:
It's harder to get good footing on the sand
when you're wearing socks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Going barefoot makes it possible to grip the sand
with your toes, so it's even easier than running in
shoes. The idea is that wearing socks will make it
harder.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain that socks will also make them more
likely to slip, so this exercise will make for good
footwork training.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! So you can ramp up the challenge that
way, huh?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I don't remember if I brought extra socks... Well, I
guess I can just wash these ones after.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's get ready.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Yesss! The flag is miiiiine!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Argh! I'm definitely gonna get it next time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki and the others continue running up
and down the beach until their white socks are
completely covered in sand.
